name: Blanche Thomas
abstract: Blanche Thomas (October 5, 1922 – April 21, 1977) was an American blues and jazz singer, based in New Orleans.

about_quotes.speaker: Emmanuel Sayles
about_quotes.evidence: We had a trio, uh, Andrew Johnson on drums, Jimmy Davis on piano, and, uh, me on electric guitar, and we was using Blanche Thomas at the time. Oh, the vocalist, yeah.

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Williams
about_quotes.evidence: Blanche Thomas was vocal with my group... Blanche was working during the time with us.

about_quotes.speaker: Bernard Steinau
about_quotes.evidence: let's see who was that was it Blanche Thomas or Jeanette Kimball Jeanette Kimball played the piano and I think I had the impression she ran the band but I could be wrong

about_quotes.speaker: Sid Davilla
about_quotes.evidence: What we did was Smiling Joe up there, and Joe Robichaud and Lizzie Miles and Blanche Thomas did up there.
